request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts families at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't just about defense - it's about protecting our children's future. When I visit schools, parents constantly ask me about data security. We need to support local innovation so we're not held hostage by foreign interests. #SecureOurFuture #MomsForAutonomy
